  "findings": [
    "Worker riding in bucket without fall arrest system anchored to boom or basket.",
    "No evidence of personal fall arrest system per 1926.502."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately.",
    "Lower bucket and exit only after fall arrest is properly attached.",
    "Verify harness, lanyard, and anchor point meet OSHA 1926.502 requirements before resuming."
  ],
  "rationale": "Riding in a bucket without fall arrest is a recognized imminent danger. OSHA 1926.502 mandates a personal fall arrest system for employees in aerial lifts. The in-progress condition requires immediate halt and correction.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.502(d)",
    "OSHA 1926.453(b)(2)(v)"
  ]
}
